accordion_sections.heading: Assessment
accordion_sections.html:
• Confirm HRT regimen type (continuous combined or sequential), dose, route, and start/change dates.
  • Characterise bleeding onset, frequency, heaviness and duration.
  • Assess endometrial cancer risk factors and exclude non-endometrial bleeding sources where indicated.
  • Check progestogen adequacy and adherence in all women with a uterus.

accordion_sections.heading: Primary care management
accordion_sections.html:
• For low-risk women, optimise HRT/progestogen for up to 6 months if bleeding starts within 6 months of HRT initiation or persists up to 3 months after regimen change.
  • Ensure adequate progestogen exposure and correct regimen use.
  • Adjust dose/preparation as needed and provide clear safety-net advice.
  • Escalate earlier if bleeding is heavy/prolonged or worsening.

accordion_sections.heading: Who to refer
accordion_sections.html:
Hospital admission (same day)

  • Haemodynamic instability, severe acute blood loss, or other emergency features.

Urgent suspicion of cancer (USOC)

  • Clinical/imaging concern for endometrial malignancy.
  • Thickened endometrium above reassurance thresholds with concerning context.

Urgent (non-cancer outpatient)

  • Urgent TVUS (within 6 weeks) if first bleed occurs >6 months after starting HRT.
  • Urgent TVUS if bleeding persists >3 months after HRT regimen change.
  • Urgent TVUS for heavy/prolonged bleeding or additional endometrial-cancer risk factors.

Routine (outpatient)

  • Persistent unscheduled bleeding despite 6 months of structured regimen adjustment in low-risk women.
  • Diagnostic uncertainty requiring gynaecology review.

Include in referral

  • HRT details (type, dose, route, start/change dates), bleeding pattern, risk factors, and prior investigation results including TVUS.

accordion_sections.heading: Who not to refer
accordion_sections.html: • Do not routinely refer low-risk early unscheduled bleeding that is within the expected adjustment window and improving after appropriate HRT/progestogen optimisation.

accordion_sections.heading: References
accordion_sections.html:
1. BMS Guideline: Management of unscheduled bleeding on HRT (Nov 2024).
  2. NICE NG23 Menopause.
  3. NICE NG12 Suspected cancer.
